ext.description: Set video/image backgrounds (MP4, WebM, OGG, JPG, PNG, GIF) for your VSCode workspace
cmd.openWorkshop: VSCode Background: Open Background Workshop (GitHub Discussions)
config.title: VSCode Background
config.enabled:
Enable/disable background.

After changing, run **Install/Update** command to apply.
config.videos:
Media file paths (videos and images). Supports:
- **Videos**: `*.mp4`, `*.webm`, `*.ogg`
- **Images**: `*.jpg`, `*.png`, `*.gif`, `*.webp`
- Absolute local paths: `C:\\Videos\\bg.mp4` or `/home/user/photos/bg.jpg`
- `file:///` URLs
- `https://` URLs

**Files stay at their original location** and are NOT affected by VSCode updates.
Videos and images can be mixed freely for a rotating background slideshow.

[$(add) Add Media via Picker](command:vscode-background.addVideos) | [$(account) Background Workshop](command:vscode-background.openWorkshop)
config.workshopUrl:
Background Workshop: GitHub Discussions URL for sharing and discovering backgrounds.

[$(account) Open Workshop](command:vscode-background.openWorkshop)
config.opacity:
Workbench opacity (0 = fully transparent, 1 = fully opaque).

**Tip:** Try 0.7~0.9 for the best experience.
config.switchInterval:
Seconds between switching media (video/image).

Set to `0` to loop the current media forever.

Recommended minimum: 10 seconds.
config.theme.glass: Glass — Fully transparent, video shows clearly
config.theme.matte: Matte — Dark background, no blur or frosted effect
config.theme.neon: Neon — Cyberpunk style with glowing cyan/magenta borders
config.theme.cinema: Cinema — Dark cinematic look with letterbox-style bars
config.theme.aurora: Aurora — Colorful gradient overlay with soft glow
config.theme.minimal: Minimal — Only reduces opacity, no extra effects
